title: US Israel Iran War LIVE: Iran Guards Say Will Target US Tech Firms If More Leaders Killed
summary_full: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: The United States and Israel continue to strike Iran, whose retaliatory attacks have targeted Israel and neighboring Gulf Arab states. More than 3,000 people have been killed.
